food_log_one_reference.name: food_log_one_reference
food_log_one_reference.value: ("food_log"."food_id" is not null)::int + ("food_log"."recipe_id" is not null)::int = 1

wte_reps_range_valid.name: wte_reps_range_valid
wte_reps_range_valid.value: "workout_template_exercises"."target_reps_max" IS NULL OR "workout_template_exercises"."target_reps_min" IS NULL OR "workout_template_exercises"."target_reps_max" >= "workout_template_exercises"."target_reps_min"
